productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pink White Sweet Hunny Pack of 2 Kidswear
description: CompositionSet of two topstop 1 - Coral red round neck top made of 100% cotton, with interlocked ruffled hemline, white piping around neckline, white cap sleeves with interlocked ruffled sleeve hem and graphic on the chestTop 2 - White round neck top made of 100% cotton, with interlocked ruffled hemline, bubble-gum pink piping around neckline, bubble-gum pink cap sleeves with interlocked ruffled sleeve hem and graphic on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours in cold waterGentle cycleDo not soak or wringDo not bleach or tumble dryTurn inside out before dryingUse warm ironDo not iron on prints and studsPooh says 'hello' to his little friends in these two little tops in white and coral red. The bright bubble-gum pink and happy coral red colours and ruffled hems add a touch of happy girlishness to the two tops. The graphic of Pooh on both will make your little gilr feel cheerful and bright his summer. Made of 100% organic cotton fabric, it's extra soft and comfy on his tender skin. Team this tee with crocs footwear for that cute look.
